**Honesty-rules checklist**
- [ ] Every new claim carries a tag: `[proved]` / `[established (others')]` / `[conjecture]` / `[interpretation]` / `[fitted]`.
- [ ] External results are cited to a primary source.
- [ ] No fabricated numbers, assignments, or derivations — computed, cited, or marked "unknown".
- [ ] Negative results (if any) are stated plainly, not buried.
- [ ] New computations are self-contained and reproducible (a script under `scripts/`, standard-library + `sympy`/`numpy`).
- [ ] Files land in the correct folder and cross-references use folder-qualified paths.
